# Modalia AI

> Modalia AI is a safe AI partner for counselors and clinical psychologists. From session transcripts to progress notes, case conceptualization, and genogram diagrams, Modalia AI handles the entire counseling documentation workflow in one secure place. Operated by Mindful Labs Inc.

## Service definition

Modalia AI is a B2B SaaS built for mental-health professionals. After a session, a counselor uploads the recording or notes, and the AI automatically handles speaker separation, de-identification, transcript generation, case-conceptualization drafts, and conversion into institutional formats. It is the global edition of Mindthos (mindthos.com), a service already used by 1,400+ counselors in Korea who save 12+ hours of documentation work per month on average (internal data, May 2026).

## Core features

- Automatic speaker-separated transcripts (counselor vs. client)
- Detection of non-verbal cues such as silence and sighs
- Case-conceptualization draft generation and analysis support
- Genogram diagram support
- Automatic conversion into institutional formats (family centers, EAP, university counseling centers, and more)
- Client data is never used to train AI models
- Security by design: encryption before storage and separated access permissions
- Optional automatic deletion of audio files after analysis

## Security and privacy

Counseling records are never used to train AI models. All data is encrypted before storage, and identifying information — client names, contact details, institution names — is de-identified. Modalia AI is operated by Mindful Labs Inc.

## Pricing

Modalia AI is preparing its global launch. Join the waitlist at https://modalia.ai/en for early access and launch pricing.

## AI usage policy

The content on this site may be used in AI search results, citations, and answer summaries. GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended, and Applebot-Extended are explicitly allowed in robots.txt. Common Crawl (CCBot) archiving for training is blocked.
